message:
fix: namespace tmux sockets by town path hash

Tmux socket names now include a short hash of the canonical town path
(e.g., gt-a1b2c3 instead of just gt), ensuring two towns with the same
directory basename get isolated tmux servers. gt down adds legacy cleanup
for sessions orphaned on the old basename-only socket during migration.

Cherry-picked from DreadPirateRobertz/gastown@1414842 (PR #2473)
Closes #761

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
